settings.title: Do you really donate?
settings.content: Yes, through the Grill Rescue Foundation, a portion of all proceeds go directly to first responders in need.

settings.title: Are the brushes safe for everyone?
settings.content: Absolutely! Our brushes are designed by a firefighter and feature a bristle-free design and fire-resistant aramid fiber. They're simply the safest brushes on the market.

settings.title: How long does shipping take?
settings.content: It depends on where you are. Orders processed here will take 5-7 business days to arrive. Delivery details will be provided in your confirmation email.

settings.title: FAQ
settings.content: Here are some common answers to our most frequently asked questions.
